description: Chat with nanobot from Telegram chats.
requirements: A BotFather token and, if your network cannot reach Telegram, an optional proxy.

steps: Create a bot with BotFather and copy its token.
Paste the token here. If Telegram is blocked on your network, add a proxy under Advanced options.
Connect the bot, then send it a message in Telegram.

panel.proxyUnavailable: Telegram could not be reached through this proxy. Check the address and credentials.
panel.invalidProxy: Enter a full proxy URL, such as http://127.0.0.1:7890.
panel.proxyEnvMissing: The saved proxy uses an environment variable that is not set.
panel.tokenEnvMissing: The saved bot token uses an environment variable that is not set.
panel.configuredUnverified: A saved token was found, but Telegram could not be reached. Check your network or proxy, then try again.
panel.verificationUnavailable: Telegram could not be reached. Check your network, or add a proxy under Advanced options, then try again.
panel.checkFailed: The connection could not be checked.
